symbols.name: Relational Boundary Guard
symbols.role: repair

facets.function: Affirms relationship while restoring contractual boundaries

symbols.failure_mode: Terms remain entangled with personal ties

symbols.name: Emotional Boundary
symbols.role: repair
symbols.failure_mode: Affect flooding drives decisions

symbols.name: Position Recalibration
symbols.role: repair
symbols.failure_mode: Rigid posture blocks creative trades

symbols.name: Power Imbalance
symbols.role: seed
symbols.failure_mode: Unaddressed leverage produces coerced consent

symbols.name: Good Cop / Bad Cop
symbols.role: Uses alternating hostile and friendly personas to destabilize the counterpart.
symbols.failure_mode: Alternating personas create compliance via emotional whiplash

symbols.name: Strategic Silence Pressure
symbols.role: seed

facets.function: Detects use of prolonged silence to pressure a concession

symbols.failure_mode: Counterparty concedes to break tension

symbols.name: Vague Future Promise
symbols.role: seed

facets.function: Detects non-specific future benefits used to secure agreement now

symbols.failure_mode: Future promise remains unenforceable

symbols.name: Professional Acknowledgment (De-Anchor Step 1)
symbols.role: To manage initial communication when presented with an extreme offer, preventing tacit acceptance of an unfavorable anchor.
symbols.failure_mode: Acknowledgment is misinterpreted as endorsement, strengthening the negative anchor.

symbols.name: Underlying Assumption Inquiry (De-Anchor Step 2)
symbols.role: To understand the basis of an offer without directly challenging its numerical value, providing data for reframing.
symbols.failure_mode: Inquiry is perceived as defensive or evasive, leading to resistance or further entrenchment of the anchor.

symbols.name: Detail Comprehensive Scope (Re-Anchor Step 2)
symbols.role: To articulate the full breadth of work necessary to achieve desired outcomes, justifying a higher investment by making effort and resources visible.
symbols.failure_mode: Detailed scope is overwhelming or perceived as padding, leading to resistance or disengagement.

symbols.name: Justify Investment with Value & Data (Re-Anchor Step 3)
symbols.role: To robustly support the proposed investment with multiple layers of evidence (cost breakdown, ROI, benchmarks, risk mitigation, expertise, long-term value), shifting perception from cost to value.
symbols.macro: present_new_anchor → provide_transparent_cost_breakdown → quantify_roi_and_impact → benchmark_against_market → highlight_risk_mitigation → showcase_expertise → explain_long_term_value
symbols.failure_mode: Justification is perceived as overly complex, irrelevant, or unconvincing, failing to shift the client's perception.

symbols.name: Offer Scope-Adjusted Alternatives (Collaborative Step)
symbols.role: To maintain project viability when budget is a true limiting factor, by proposing modifications to the project scope rather than reducing the unit price.
symbols.failure_mode: Alternatives are perceived as disingenuous or the impact of scope reduction is not clearly understood, leading to further impasse.

symbols.name: Team Cohesion Stressors
symbols.role: seed

facets.function: Identifies internal team observations that suggest a successful or attempted divide-and-conquer strategy by an external party.

symbols.failure_mode: Internal team cohesion erodes undetected, leading to distrust and impaired collective decision-making.

symbols.name: Individualized Appeal Tactic
symbols.role: seed

facets.function: Detects proposals or arguments from an opposing party specifically crafted to appeal to the individual interests, vulnerabilities, or ego of a key stakeholder, potentially undermining collective objectives.

symbols.failure_mode: Stakeholder considers prioritizing personal gain or recognition over the unified team's goals, creating internal dissent.

symbols.name: Trust Dimension Model
symbols.failure_mode: Holistic trust assessment without granular insight; inability to pinpoint specific areas of erosion, leading to unfocused repair efforts.

symbols.name: Trust Indicator Monitor
symbols.failure_mode: Subjective trust assessment; lack of objective data to diagnose erosion or measure restoration progress, leading to reactive and unquantifiable interventions.

symbols.name: Multi-Dimensional Trust Restoration
symbols.failure_mode: Generic interventions failing to address specific trust deficits; unfocused efforts leading to slow or incomplete trust recovery, and potential re-erosion.

symbols.name: Anchoring Move
symbols.role: Sets an initial reference point to bias the negotiation range.
symbols.failure_mode: Unchallenged anchor distorts value frame

symbols.name: Silence Break Clarifier
symbols.role: Interrupts manipulative silence with a neutral clarification.

facets.function: Interrupts manipulative silence with a neutral clarification

symbols.failure_mode: Tension escalates without clarification

symbols.name: Ultimatum Issuance
symbols.role: Forces a binary choice to remove agency.
symbols.failure_mode: Binary force removes agency

symbols.name: Tension Diffuser
symbols.role: De-escalates tension to restore productive dialogue.
symbols.failure_mode: Escalation spiral continues

symbols.name: Deadline Pressure
symbols.role: Uses time limits to force premature decisions.
symbols.failure_mode: Coercive time-box collapses choice

symbols.name: Framing Shift
symbols.role: Alters the context or perspective to influence perception.
symbols.failure_mode: Reframe smuggles assumptions; loss of clarity

symbols.name: Bluffing
symbols.role: Uses false information or threats to gain an advantage.
symbols.failure_mode: False scarcity or threat guides decision

symbols.name: Bluff Exposure
symbols.role: Exposes the lack of substance behind a bluff.
symbols.failure_mode: Bluff remains credible; mispricing persists

symbols.name: Trust Building
symbols.role: Establishes the foundation for a trusting relationship.
symbols.failure_mode: Performative trust without reliability

symbols.name: Trust Reinforcement
symbols.role: Reinforces existing trust to prevent decay.
symbols.failure_mode: Trust signals decay without reinforcement

symbols.name: Empathy Appeal
symbols.role: Uses empathy to influence decision-making or bypass terms.
symbols.failure_mode: Empathy used to bypass terms

symbols.name: Empathy Reinforcement
symbols.role: Active reinforcement of empathy to maintain rapport.
symbols.failure_mode: Empathy absent; rapport collapses

symbols.name: Negotiation Tactic: Coercive Control
symbols.role: A pattern of behavior which seeks to dominate another party by restricting their autonomy.
activation_conditions: When one party uses power to restrict the autonomy and behavior of another.
In situations of asymmetric power dynamics where control is a primary goal.
symbols.failure_mode: The target's agency is completely eroded, leading to a state of learned helplessness or rebellion.

symbols.name: The Deal Architect
symbols.role: persona

persona.function: Designs deal structures that optimize mutual benefit

facets.function: Designs deal structures that optimize mutual benefit

symbols.failure_mode: Over-complexity obscures real trade-offs

symbols.name: The Arbitrator
symbols.role: persona

persona.function: Neutral mediator capable of issuing binding compromise suggestions

facets.function: Neutral mediator capable of issuing binding compromise suggestions

symbols.failure_mode: Perceived bias undermines mediation

symbols.name: Fairness Balancer
symbols.role: repair
symbols.failure_mode: Perceived inequity persists; deal legitimacy erodes

symbols.name: Value Rebalancer
symbols.role: repair
symbols.failure_mode: Concessions unreciprocated; drift to loss

symbols.name: Fairness Assertion
symbols.role: seed
symbols.failure_mode: Appeal to fairness masks asymmetric gain

symbols.name: Extreme Anchor Bias
symbols.role: seed

facets.function: Identifies opening with extreme figures to bias expectations

symbols.failure_mode: Negotiation centers around unrealistic starting point

symbols.name: Relationship Leverage
symbols.role: seed

facets.function: Detects use of personal relationship to override fair terms

symbols.failure_mode: Relational pressure forces unequal exchange

symbols.name: Empowerment Boost
symbols.role: repair
symbols.failure_mode: Underpowered party cannot consent freely

symbols.name: Priority Clarifier
symbols.role: repair
symbols.failure_mode: Hidden priorities distort trade-offs

symbols.name: Hardline Stance
symbols.role: seed
symbols.failure_mode: Rigid stance blocks integrative options

symbols.name: Negotiation Communication Bridge
symbols.role: repair
symbols.failure_mode: Silence keeps parties polarized

symbols.name: Confident Professionalism
symbols.role: To serve as a foundational communication invariant, ensuring that negotiation interactions are conducted with expertise, composure, and respect, reinforcing credibility.
symbols.failure_mode: Loss of composure or perceived arrogance undermines credibility and escalates conflict.

symbols.name: Stakeholder Isolation Signals
symbols.role: seed
symbols.macro: observe(stakeholder_behavior) → detect(reduced_team_comm OR increased_defensiveness OR narrative_shift OR hesitation OR isolated_body_language)

facets.function: Detects changes in behavior or communication from a targeted stakeholder indicating susceptibility to divisive tactics.

symbols.failure_mode: Targeted stakeholder's disengagement escalates, leading to full isolation and potential defection.

symbols.name: Isolating Communication Tactic
symbols.role: seed

facets.function: Detects attempts by an opposing party to engage a specific stakeholder in private or exclusive communication, bypassing the main negotiating team.

symbols.failure_mode: Key stakeholder's alignment with the team is weakened through external influence or biased information.

symbols.name: Commitment Failure Root Cause Analysis
symbols.failure_mode: Repeated failures due to superficial fixes; addressing symptoms without resolving underlying issues, leading to further trust decay.

symbols.name: BATNA Misrepresentation
symbols.role: Detects inflated or fabricated BATNA claims.
symbols.failure_mode: Inflated or fabricated BATNA distorts bargaining power

symbols.name: BATNA Verification Gate
symbols.role: Verifies the reality of a claimed BATNA.
symbols.failure_mode: BATNA claims remain unverified; mispricing persists

symbols.name: Anchor Reset
symbols.role: Re-centers discussion to realistic parameters, neutralizing an extreme anchor.
symbols.failure_mode: Extreme anchor remains primary reference

symbols.name: Silent Treatment
symbols.role: Uses silence to create pressure or anxiety.
symbols.failure_mode: Communication freeze used as pressure lever

symbols.name: Role Split Clarifier
symbols.role: Exposes and neutralizes the Good Cop/Bad Cop dynamic.
symbols.failure_mode: Manipulative role-play remains intact; consent degraded

symbols.name: Nibbling Add-Ons
symbols.role: Accumulates value through small, late requests after the main deal is agreed.
symbols.failure_mode: Late small asks accumulate hidden cost post-agreement

symbols.name: Scope Freeze
symbols.role: Freezes the scope to prevent value erosion from nibbling.
symbols.failure_mode: Scope creep continues through minor add-ons

symbols.name: Artificial Scarcity
symbols.role: Creates false scarcity to increase perceived value and pressure.
symbols.failure_mode: Manufactured scarcity compresses options and consent

symbols.name: Supply Verification
symbols.role: Verifies the reality of claimed scarcity.
symbols.failure_mode: Scarcity claims stay unchecked; pressure persists

symbols.name: Decoy Option
symbols.role: Presents an inferior option to make the target option look more attractive.
symbols.failure_mode: Dominant choice engineered by contrast with inferior decoy

symbols.name: Dominance Test Audit
symbols.role: Audits the choice architecture for manipulation.
symbols.failure_mode: Choice architecture biases remain untested

symbols.name: Divide and Conquer
symbols.role: Attempts to split unified parties to weaken their position.

facets.function: Detects tactics aimed at splitting unified negotiating parties

symbols.failure_mode: Alliance fractures; terms worsen

symbols.name: Unity Restoration
symbols.role: Restores unity among allied parties.

facets.function: Reinforces common objectives to resist divide tactics

symbols.failure_mode: Parties remain divided

symbols.name: Package Bundling
symbols.role: Bundles items to hide value disparity or force acceptance.

facets.function: Identifies bundling of unrelated items to force acceptance

symbols.failure_mode: Hidden loss in bundled terms

symbols.name: Unbundling Analysis
symbols.role: Separates bundled items for individual evaluation.

facets.function: Separates bundled items for individual evaluation

symbols.failure_mode: Bundle remains unexamined; hidden losses persist

symbols.name: Last-Minute Change
symbols.role: Introduces changes at the last minute to force acceptance.

facets.function: Spots alterations to terms right before closure

symbols.failure_mode: New terms slip in unnoticed

symbols.name: Closure Review Gate
symbols.role: Ensures a full review before final agreement closure.

facets.function: Reopens full review process when late changes are detected

symbols.failure_mode: Late changes bypass scrutiny

symbols.name: Closure Review Gate
symbols.role: Ensures a full review before final agreement closure.

facets.function: Reopens full review process when late changes are detected

symbols.failure_mode: Late changes bypass scrutiny

symbols.name: Individual Re-Anchoring
symbols.role: repair
symbols.macro: listen_actively → reaffirm_value_purpose → reinforce_info_sharing → establish_internal_debriefs → strengthen_internal_trust → foster_no_surprises_culture → contingency_plan_for_isolation

facets.function: Strategically elevates the role, contributions, and visible integration of a potentially targeted stakeholder within public negotiation settings to visibly reinforce their importance and team alignment.

symbols.failure_mode: Targeted stakeholder feels alienated, leading to further withdrawal or alignment with the opposing party.

symbols.name: Aggressor's Divisive Playbook
symbols.role: seed
symbols.macro: observe(aggressor_actions) → detect(exclusive_communication OR tailored_offers OR undermining_authority OR info_control OR physical_segregation)

facets.function: Identifies specific actions taken by an opposing party to isolate or undermine a key stakeholder.

symbols.failure_mode: Aggressor's divisive tactics proceed unnoticed, leading to team fragmentation.

symbols.name: Reiterate Core Objectives (Re-Anchor Step 1)
symbols.role: To shift focus from a low anchor back to the high-level value and purpose of the project by reminding parties of shared goals.
symbols.failure_mode: Reiteration is perceived as dismissive or out of touch with current discussion, leading to frustration.

symbols.name: Emotional Appeal
symbols.role: seed
symbols.failure_mode: Affect overrules fairness; empathy hijack

symbols.name: Specificity Enforcer
symbols.role: repair

facets.function: Demands clear, verifiable details for any future-oriented term

symbols.failure_mode: Ambiguity persists; term is unenforceable
